title: 2026-02-02 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 13.23
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-02-02: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 13.23/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-02-02, the score printed 13.23/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
